_meta._note: Live site has minimal home-page copy: H1 only, no hero subtitle, no per-service blurbs, no whatWeDo body separate from About. Service blurbs sourced from services.json where available; otherwise null. testimonial.attribution kept as scraped ('En S, Parent').

hero.title: Urbane Ethos Early Intervention Center
hero.subtitle: Speech, motor, learning, behaviour. A small Shah Alam team working alongside families since 2005.

personalization.heading: Tell us a little about your child
personalization.subheading: Skip if you'd rather browse on your own.

location.title: Visit us
location.address: 4, Jalan Elektron U16/E, Denai Alam, 40160 Shah Alam

items.title: Screening or Assessment
items.blurb: Observation of the children at school or at home during playtime. Full assessment of child's language development stages.

items.title: Occupational Therapy
items.blurb: Paediatric occupational therapy focuses on helping children develop the skills they need to grow into functional, independent adults.

items.title: Speech Therapy
items.blurb: Speech therapists handle speech issues such as stuttering or lisps, as well as helping other kinds of problems with spoken and written language such as dyslexia, dyspraxia, and auditory processing disorder.

items.title: Special Education
items.blurb: One-to-one teaching for children who learn at their own pace. We meet your child where they are and build from there.
items._note: Special Education has no standalone description on services page; covered within the EIP programs. Blurb is drafted (see _draft map).

items.title: Early Intervention Program
items.blurb: Therapy-based group program conducted daily by our certified Occupational Therapist, Speech Therapist/Clinical Linguist as well as our Special Education Teacher.

items.title: Clinical Psychology
items.blurb: Clinical psychologists meet with clients to identify problems - emotional, mental, and behavioural - in their lives. Through observation, interviews, and tests, the psychologist will diagnose any existing or potential disorders.

testimonial.quote: Yes. They are very helpful during and after sessions. therapists can further help to explain what can be done to assist the patient in meeting a specific target /milestone/goal for the next session. A checklist would be great to help parents to monitor the progress of the patient.

whatWeDo.heading: What can we do for you?
whatWeDo.body: Urbane Ethos Early Intervention Center provides early intervention for language and speech disorders, motor, cognitive and learning disabilities. We provide 1. Individualized one-to-one therapy sessions and group sessions along with parent consultations and discussions with therapists 2. Parent and Teacher Training, Seminars, and Workshops 3. Assessments and Screening programs in-clinic and to schools by trained and certified allied health professionals

staffFeatured.personalLine: I came home from Syracuse to build the kind of centre I wished existed when I was a young researcher in linguistics.
I sit with families through the hardest questions first, before we talk about anything else.
I've spent over a decade with kids who needed someone to slow down and notice what they could already do.

events.heading: EVENTS
events.blurb: We run small parent workshops and quiet sensory-friendly meetups through the year. Topics shift with what families are asking us about.
events._note: Events section heading exists on home, but no event details / blurb are present on the live site. Blurb is drafted (see _draft map).
